name: Walking (Outdoor)
description: Low-impact steady state cardio. Great for recovery and burning calories without stress.

name: Treadmill Walking
description: Indoor walking with adjustable incline for increased intensity.

name: Running (Outdoor)
description: Classic high-impact cardio for endurance, leg strength, and calorie burn.

name: Treadmill Running
description: Indoor running with adjustable speed and incline for controlled cardio sessions.

name: Cycling (Outdoor)
description: Low-impact cardio that builds leg endurance and is easy on the joints.

name: Stationary Bike
description: Indoor cycling with adjustable resistance; great for HIIT or steady-state cardio.

name: Rowing Machine
description: Full-body cardio that engages legs, back, arms, and core with every stroke.

name: Elliptical Trainer
description: Low-impact, full-body motion simulating running without joint stress.

name: Stair Climber
description: Simulates stair climbing to build glute and quad endurance while torching calories.

name: Jump Rope
description: High-intensity, portable cardio that improves coordination, calves, and stamina.

name: Burpees
description: Full-body explosive movement combining squat, push-up, and jump; elite calorie burner.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: Fast-paced plank-based movement that spikes heart rate and engages core.

name: High Knees
description: Running in place while driving knees high; improves speed, hip flexors, and cardio capacity.

name: Sprint Intervals
description: Short bursts of all-out running followed by rest; builds power and metabolic conditioning.

name: Swimming
description: Zero-impact, full-body cardio that builds lung capacity and muscular endurance.

name: Battle Ropes
description: Wave or slam heavy ropes for upper-body dominant cardio and grip endurance.

name: Shadow Boxing
description: Boxing movements without a bag; improves footwork, shoulder endurance, and cardio flow.
